nasb.text: God was with the lad, and he grew; and he lived in the wilderness and became an archer.

esv.text: And God was with the boy, and he grew up. He lived in the wilderness and became an expert with the bow.

cnv.text: 神與孩子同在，他漸漸長大，住在曠野，成了個弓箭手。

ccb.text: 在上帝的看顾下，孩子在旷野渐渐长大，成为一个射箭能手。

csbs.text: 神与那少年同在；他渐渐长大，住在旷野中，成了射箭能手。
